title.en: This gave him the hope of opening up the extrad...

content.en:
In order to perfect the extra-dimensional heart domain, Ye Tian used the Jialan stone disk to deduce and improve.

After perfecting it again and again, the method of opening up the super-dimensional heart domain was finally perfected, and it fit him perfectly.

In this way, he had the hope of opening up a super-dimensional heart domain in the peak realm of divine cultivation.

"Start opening up the extra-dimensional heart domain again!"

This time, Ye Tian failed to condense at the last critical moment, which was much better than before.

This gave him the hope of opening up the extradimensional heart domain.

......

In the blink of an eye, the three hundred billion extradimensional era years have passed.

This is not a long time, but for Ye Tian, it is a huge transformation.

Because on this day, he successfully opened up the extradimensional heart domain.

Rumble!!!!!

The extra-dimensional heart domain was successfully developed.

At this moment, his control of extradimensional power skyrocketed.

Endless extradimensional power poured into the extra-dimensional heart domain, gradually filling the super dimensional heart domain.

The initial extradimensional domain was very small, only one light-year in diameter.

However, as Ye Tian began to refine the power of the super dimension, he found that the super dimensional domain was also slowly increasing, and it seemed that the quality of the super 05 dimensional power affected the area of the super dimensional heart domain.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also discovered that the extra-dimensional heart domain could also increase his combat power, which could allow him to exert the true power of the super-dimensional power to a great extent.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's extradimensional power became stronger and stronger, and the superdimensional heart domain was also skyrocketing.

However, it is not so easy to refine the power of the superdimensional to the realm of Xiaocheng.

"If you practice step by step, if you want to refine the power of the super-dimensional to the realm of Xiaocheng, you can't do it without hundreds of extra-dimensional eras. Ye Tian said darkly.

He wanted to find some resources that could assist in refining the power of the extradimensional, and he tried all kinds of resources on his body, but he couldn't find such resources.

"The Garan Chamber of Commerce may have this kind of resource. "

Ye Tian guessed.

So, he went to the Garan Chamber of Commerce again.

Here, after inquiry, he learned that the Garan Chamber of Commerce did have the resources to assist in refining the power of the extradimensional, but the price was expensive.

For example, a substance called the Immortal Golden Picedony, just one drop requires 10 million Galan Treasure Coins, and if you want to quickly refine the power of the extradimensional dimension, you need many drops of the Immortal Golden Picedony.

Ye Tian exchanged a lot of Gala Blue Treasure Coins, and then bought ten drops of Immortal Golden Pith in one go, ready to try the effect.

......

Inside the mansion.

Ye Tian took out a drop of immortal golden marrow, swallowed it in one gulp, refined it, and integrated it into the superdimensional heart domain to assist in refining the superdimensional power.

Rumble!!!!!

Countless golden threads of light accelerated the refining of the superdimensional power, making the refining speed of the superdimensional power far surpass that of the past.

"A hundred times the quenching efficiency!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

In other words, as long as there is enough immortal golden marrow, within a superdimensional era, he will be able to refine the superdimensional power to the Xiaocheng realm, so that he can condense the fourteenth eternal realm spirit.

However, it is difficult to say how long this drop of immortal golden pith can be refined.

Time gradually passed, and this drop of immortal golden pith continued to refine Ye Tian's super-dimensional power, so that the super-dimensional power and the super-dimensional heart domain continued to increase.

About a hundred trillion years had passed before he had truly refined this drop of immortal golden pith.

"One trillion years of the Dao Era consume one drop of immortal golden pith, that is to say, I need to consume one hundred drops of immortal golden pith to be able to cultivate a superdimensional era, and to be able to refine the superdimensional power to the realm of Xiaocheng. Ye Tian estimated.

"One billion Gala Treasure Coins, the average half-step extradimensional realm is not easy to take out, so you have to exhaust all your net worth. If I take out so many Garanbao coins, I will definitely be targeted!" Ye Tian was worried about this problem.

Maybe the Jialan Chamber of Commerce won't care about this Jialanbao coin, but what about the half-step extradimensional realm of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce, maybe he has this thought, even if he doesn't do it, he will be very troublesome to notify other half-step extradimensional realms to do it to him.

Unless, he never leaves the Void City.

"Maybe you can condense another replica body and hide it in other places, so that even if this replica body is targeted or even killed, there will still be a replica body staying in the territory of Six Thousand, and there is no need to send another replica body over. "

With this idea, Ye Tian condensed a copy body, secretly left the Extreme Yang Realm, and entered the Treasure Refining Realm on the treasure ship of another force.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian's replica body left in the Extreme Yang Realm came to the Jialan Chamber of Commerce again to buy more immortal golden marrow.

Buying again and again, the Blue Treasure Coin that Ye Tian paid was not something that a normal peak realm god could have at all.

Unless it is some junior of the extradimensional realm who has such wealth, but as long as he investigates a little, he will find that Ye Tian is not the peak realm god of the Six Thousand Realm, even if he has any background, he will not be able to reach the Six Thousand Realm.

Therefore, some half-step extradimensional realms would definitely dare to attack him. []

......

Inside the Void City.

In an attic, a half-step superdimensional realm hidden cultivator stayed here, staring at Ye Tian's mansion, but with the existence of a superdimensional formation, his will could not penetrate into it.

"An alien peak realm god, he has purchased a large amount of immortal golden pith in a short period of time, and the wealth on his body is comparable to the entire net worth of a powerful half-step transcendent realm, if I kill 617 him, I can obtain a large amount of wealth and immortal golden pith. "

This half-step transcendent realm secretly said in his heart.

He didn't think that Ye Tian would refine the Immortal Golden Essence now, he thought that Ye Tian was buying the Immortal Golden Essence again and again, and he wanted not to affect his attention, but this couldn't be hidden at all.

Therefore, as long as he killed Ye Tian, those immortal golden pith and Ye Tian's belongings belonged to him.

Of course, he needed to pay a part of the treasure to a certain half-step extradimensional realm of the Garan Chamber of Commerce, and if it weren't for the other party, he wouldn't be able to get this information.

"When he leaves Broken Void City, I'll do it immediately!"

This half-step extradimensional realm secret path.

He thought that it was impossible for a peak realm god to stay in Broken Void City all the time, and he had enough time anyway to wait near Broken Void City all the time.

......

Inside the mansion.

"There's really a half-step extradimensional realm staring at me!"

Ye Tian had walked in the Broken Void City, and every time he used his copy body to perceive a half-step transcendent realm.

Once or twice may be a coincidence, but every time the opponent is nearby, it's not normal.

Therefore, the other party is definitely eyeing him.

"I can't go out for the time being, and when the superdimensional power breaks through the Xiaocheng realm and condenses the fourteenth eternal realm spirit, my strength will skyrocket, maybe I won't be afraid of that half-step superdimensional realm!" Ye Tian said darkly.
